Program.cs.\r\n- Preserve existing class names and property names as much as possible.\r\n- Keep the domain model compatible with existing code from Lab 2.\r\n\r\nApply these EF-ready rules:\r\n- Add using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations where needed.\r\n- Add using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema where needed.\r\n- Add [Key] to every Id property.\r\n- Navigation reference properties should be virtual.\r\n- Collection navigation properties should be virtual ICollection<T>, not List<T>.\r\n- Initialize collection navigation properties using new List<T>() or new HashSet<T>().\r\n- Add [ForeignKey(nameof(...))] on foreign key properties where relationships exist.\r\n- Keep the model read/write friendly for EF Core.\r\n\r\nExpected relationships:\r\n- Category 1-N Product\r\n- Supplier 1-N Product\r\n- Product N-N Warehouse through InventoryItem\r\n- Warehouse 1-N InventoryItem\r\n- Product 1-N InventoryItem\r\n- User 1-N Order\r\n- Order N-N Product set; }\n        public string Name { get; set; }\n        public string Description { get; set; }\n        public decimal Price { get; set; }\n        public string UnitOfMeasure { get; set; }\n        public int MinimumStock { get; set; }\n        public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }\n        public bool IsActive { get; set; }\n        public ProductType Type { get; set; }\n\n        public Category Category { get; set; }\n        public Supplier Supplier { get; set; }\n\n        public List<OrderItem> OrderItems { get; set; }\n        public List<InventoryItem> InventoryItems { get; set; }\n\n        public Product()\n        {\n            OrderItems = new List<OrderItem>();\n            InventoryItems = new List<InventoryItem>();\n        }\n    }\n}","newString":"using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;\nusing System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations.Schema;\nusing InventoryManagement.Domain.Enums;\n\nnamespace InventoryManagement.Domain.Models\n{\n    public class Product\n    {\n        [Key]\n        public int Id { get; set; }\n        public string Name { get; set; }\n        public string Description { get; set; }\n        public decimal Price { get; set; }\n        public string UnitOfMeasure { get; set; }\n        public int MinimumStock { get; set; }\n        public DateTime CreatedAt { get; set; }\n        public bool IsActive { get; set; }\n        public ProductType Type { get; set; }\n\n        public int? CategoryId { get; set; }\n        [ForeignKey(nameof(Category))]\n        public virtual Category Category { get; set; }\n\n        public int? SupplierId { get; set; }\n        [ForeignKey(nameof(Supplier))]\n        public virtual Supplier Supplier { get; set; }\n\n        public virtual ICollection<OrderItem> OrderItems { get; set; } = new HashSet<OrderItem>();\n        public virtual ICollection<InventoryItem> InventoryItems { get; set; } = new HashSet<InventoryItem>();\n\n        public Product()\n        {\n            OrderItems = new HashSet<OrderItem>();\n            InventoryItems = new HashSet<InventoryItem>();\n        }\n    }\n}"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01YVgXzZGU8nL44poGqLvpK3__vscode-1778154348960","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\nusing InventoryManagement.Domain.Models;\n\nnamespace InventoryManagement.DAL\n{\n    public class InventoryManagementDbContext : DbContext\n    {\n        public InventoryManagementDbContext(DbContextOptions<InventoryManagementDbContext> options)\n            : base(options)\n        {\n        }\n\n        // DbSet properties for all entities\n        public DbSet<Product> Products { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<Category> Categories { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<Supplier> Suppliers { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<Warehouse> Warehouses { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<InventoryItem> InventoryItems { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<User> Users { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<Order> Orders { get; set; }\n        public DbSet<OrderItem> OrderItems { get; set; }\n\n        protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)\n        {\n            base.OnModelCreating(modelBuilder);\n\n            // Configure Product entity\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Product>()\n                .Property(p => p.Price)\n                .HasColumnType(\"decimal(18,2)\")\n                .IsRequired();\n\n            // Configure Order entity\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Order>()\n                .Property(o => o.TotalPrice)\n                .HasColumnType(\"decimal(18,2)\")\n                .IsRequired();\n\n            // Configure OrderItem entity\n            modelBuilder.Entity<OrderItem>()\n                .Property(oi => oi.UnitPrice)\n                .HasColumnType(\"decimal(18,2)\")\n                .IsRequired();\n\n            modelBuilder.Entity<OrderItem>()\n                .Property(oi => oi.TotalPrice)\n                .HasColumnType(\"decimal(18,2)\")\n                .IsRequired();\n\n            modelBuilder.Entity<OrderItem>()\n                .Property(oi => oi.Discount)\n                .HasColumnType(\"decimal(18,2)\")\n                .IsRequired();\n\n            // Configure InventoryItem unique constraint on ProductId + WarehouseId\n            modelBuilder.Entity<InventoryItem>()\n                .HasIndex(ii => new { ii.ProductId, ii.WarehouseId })\n                .IsUnique();\n\n            // Configure relationships if needed\n            // Category 1-N Product (already defined in Product via CategoryId FK)\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Product>()\n                .HasOne(p => p.Category)\n                .WithMany(c => c.Products)\n                .HasForeignKey(p => p.CategoryId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.SetNull);\n\n            // Supplier 1-N Product (already defined in Product via SupplierId FK)\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Product>()\n                .HasOne(p => p.Supplier)\n                .WithMany(s => s.Products)\n                .HasForeignKey(p => p.SupplierId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.SetNull);\n\n            // Warehouse 1-N InventoryItem\n            modelBuilder.Entity<InventoryItem>()\n                .HasOne(ii => ii.Warehouse)\n                .WithMany(w => w.InventoryItems)\n                .HasForeignKey(ii => ii.WarehouseId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);\n\n            // Product 1-N InventoryItem\n            modelBuilder.Entity<InventoryItem>()\n                .HasOne(ii => ii.Product)\n                .WithMany(p => p.InventoryItems)\n                .HasForeignKey(ii => ii.ProductId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);\n\n            // User 1-N Order\n            modelBuilder.Entity<Order>()\n                .HasOne(o => o.User)\n                .WithMany(u => u.Orders)\n                .HasForeignKey(o => o.UserId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);\n\n            // Order 1-N OrderItem\n            modelBuilder.Entity<OrderItem>()\n                .HasOne(oi => oi.Order)\n                .WithMany(o => o.OrderItems)\n                .HasForeignKey(oi => oi.OrderId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);\n\n            // Product 1-N OrderItem\n            modelBuilder.Entity<OrderItem>()\n                .HasOne(oi => oi.Product)\n                .WithMany(p => p.OrderItems)\n                .HasForeignKey(oi => oi.ProductId)\n                .OnDelete(DeleteBehavior.Cascade);\n        }\n    }\n}","oldString":"using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Text;\n\nnamespace InventoryManagement.DAL\n{\n {"timestamp":"2026-05-21T12:43:26.564Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","tool_name":"replace_string_in_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement.DAL\\Repositories\\ProductEfRepository.cs","oldString":"        public Product? GetById(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.Products\n                .AsNoTracking()\n                .Include(p => p.Category)\n                .Include(p => p.Supplier)\n                .Include(p => p.InventoryItems)\n                    .ThenInclude(ii => ii.Warehouse)\n                .Include(p => p.OrderItems)\n                    .ThenInclude(oi => oi.Order)\n                .FirstOrDefault(p => p.Id == id);\n        }\n    }\n}","newString":"        public Product? GetById(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.Products\n                .AsNoTracking()\n                .Include(p => p.Category)\n                .Include(p => p.Supplier)\n                .Include(p => p.InventoryItems)\n                    .ThenInclude(ii => ii.Warehouse)\n                .Include(p => p.OrderItems)\n                    .ThenInclude(oi => oi.Order)\n                .FirstOrDefault(p => p.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        public void Add(Product product)\n        {\n            _context.Products.Add(product);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public void Update(Product product)\n        {\n            _context.Products.Update(product);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public bool Delete(int id)\n        {\n            var product = _context.Products.FirstOrDefault(p => p.Id == id);\n\n            if (product == null)\n                return false;\n\n            if (!CanDelete(id))\n                return false;\n\n            _context.Products.Remove(product);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        public bool Exists(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.Products.Any(p => p.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        public bool CanDelete(int id)\n        {\n            var product = _context.Products\n                .Include(p => p.OrderItems)\n                .Include(p => p.InventoryItems)\n                .FirstOrDefault(p => p.Id == id);\n\n            if (product == null)\n                return false;\n\n            return !product.OrderItems.Any() && !product.InventoryItems.Any();\n        }\n    }\n}"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01MmoG6zZxbVKxiN5xQ82Y1y__vscode-1779365922555","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

View(model).\r\n- map ProductFormModel to Product.\r\n- call _repository.Add(product).\r\n- redirect to Index.\r\n\r\nEdit GET:\r\n- find product by id using _repository.GetById(id).\r\n- if product is null, return NotFound().\r\n- map Product to ProductFormModel.\r\n- include CategoryDisplayName and SupplierDisplayName from related entities if available.\r\n- return View(model).\r\n\r\nEdit POST:\r\n- if id does not match model.Id, return BadRequest().\r\n- if ModelState is invalid, return View(model).\r\n- if product does not exist, return NotFound().\r\n- map ProductFormModel to Product.\r\n- call _repository.Update(product).\r\n- redirect to Details with id.\r\n\r\nDelete GET:\r\n- find product by id.\r\n- if product is null, return NotFound().\r\n- use _repository.CanDelete(id) and pass result through ViewBag.CanDelete.\r\n- return View(product).\r\n\r\nDelete POST:\r\n- call _repository.Delete(id).\r\n- if delete fails, add ModelState error and redisplay Delete view with product and ViewBag.CanDelete = false.\r\n- if delete succeeds, redirect to Index.\r\n\r\nAfter editing, briefly explain what each new action does.","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

mapping","replacements":[{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement\\Controllers\\ProductController.cs","oldString":"using InventoryManagement.ViewModels.Product;\nusing [Route(\"Product/Details/{id:int}\")]\n[Route(\"catalog/{id:int}\", Name = \"ProductCatalogDetails\")]\n        public IActionResult Details(int id)\n        {\n            var product = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (product == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            return View(product);\n        }\n    }\n}","newString":"        [Route(\"Product/Details/{id:int}\")]\n[Route(\"catalog/{id:int}\", Name = \"ProductCatalogDetails\")]\n        public IActionResult Details(int id)\n        {\n            var product = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (product == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            return View(product);\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"catalog/create\")]\n        [Route(\"Product/Create\")]\n        public IActionResult Create()\n        {\n            var model = new ProductFormModel\n            {\n                CreatedAt = DateTime.Today,\n                IsActive = true\n            };\n            return View(model);\n        }\n\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        [Route(\"catalog/create\")]\n        [Route(\"Product/Create\")]\n        public IActionResult Create(ProductFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            var product = new Product\n            {\n                Name = model.Name,\n                Description = model.Description,\n                Price = model.Price,\n                Type = model.Type,\n                CategoryId = model.CategoryId,\n                SupplierId = model.SupplierId\n            };\n\n            _repository.Add(product);\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"catalog/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [Route(\"Product/Edit/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id)\n        {\n            var product = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (product == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            var model = new ProductFormModel\n            {\n                Id = product.Id,\n                Name = product.Name,\n                Description = product.Description,\n                Price = product.Price,\n                Type = product.Type,\n                CategoryId = product.CategoryId,\n                CategoryDisplayName = product.Category?.Name,\n                SupplierId = product.SupplierId,\n                SupplierDisplayName = product.Supplier?.Name\n            };\n\n            return View(model);\n        }\n\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        [Route(\"catalog/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [Route(\"Product/Edit/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id, ProductFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (id != model.Id)\n            {\n                return BadRequest();\n            }\n\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            var product = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (product == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            product.Name = model.Name;\n            product.Description = model.Description;\n            product.Price = model.Price;\n            product.Type = model.Type;\n            product.CategoryId = model.CategoryId;\n            product.SupplierId = model.SupplierId;\n\n            _repository.Update(product);\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Details), new { id });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"catalog/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [Route(\"Product/Delete/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Delete(int id)\n        {\n            var product = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (product == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            ViewBag.CanDelete = _repository.CanDelete(id);\n            return View(product);\n        }\n\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        [ActionName(\"Delete\")]\n        [Route(\"catalog/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [Route(\"Product/Delete/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult DeleteConfirmed(int id)\n        {\n            var deleted = _repository.Delete(id);\n            \n            if (!deleted)\n            {\n                var product = _repository.GetById(id);\n                if (product != null)\n                {\n                    ViewBag.CanDelete = false;\n                    ModelState.AddModelError(\"\", \"Cannot delete this product because it has related orders or inventory items.\");\n                    return View(nameof(Delete), product);\n                }\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n        }\n    }\n}"}]},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01CRvkRU4NNVbDhM9pAP9e1y__vscode-1779365922556","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

                       <p>@(string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.Description) ? \"N/A\" : Model.Description)</p>\n                    </div>\n\n                    <div class=\"row mb-3\">\n                        <div class=\"col-md-6\">\n                            <label class=\"form-label fw-semibold text-muted\">Price</label>\n                            <p text-muted\">Category</label>\n                            <p class=\"fs-5\">\n                                @if (Model.Category != null)\n                                {\n                                    <span>@Model.Category.Name</span>\n                                }\n                                else\n                                {\n                                    <span class=\"text-muted\">N/A</span>\n                                }\n                            </p>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n\n                    <div class=\"row class=\"fs-5\">\n                                @if (Model.Supplier != null)\n                                {\n                                    <span>@Model.Supplier.Name</span>\n                                }\n                                else\n                                {\n                                    <span class=\"text-muted\">N/A</span>\n                                }\n                            </p>\n                        </div>\n                        <div class=\"col-md-6\">\n                            <label class=\"form-label fw-semibold text-muted\">Status</label>\n                            <p class=\"fs-5\">\n                                @if (Model.IsActive)\n                                {\n class=\"badge bg-secondary\">Inactive</span>\n                                }\n                            </p>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n\n                    <!-- Delete Restriction Warning -->\n                    @if (!canDelete)\n                    {\n                        <div class=\"alert alert-danger\" role=\"alert\">\n                            <i class=\"bi bi-lock-fill\"></i>\n                            <strong>Cannot Delete:</strong> This product is currently used in one or more orders or inventory records. Remove all related items before attempting deletion.\n                        </div>\n                    }\n\n                    <!-- Form Actions -->\n                    <div class=\"d-flex gap-2\">\n                        @if (canDelete)\n                        {\n                            <form method=\"post\" style=\"display: inline;\">\n                                @Html.AntiForgeryToken()\n                                <button type=\"submit\" class=\"btn btn-danger btn-lg\">\n                                    <i class=\"bi bi-trash\"></i> Delete Product\n                                </button>\n                            </form>\n                        }\n                        else\n                        {\n                            <button type=\"button\" class=\"btn btn-danger btn-lg disabled\" disabled>\n                                <i class=\"bi bi-trash\"></i> Delete Product\n                            </button>\n                        }\n\n                        <a href=\"@Url.RouteUrl(\"ProductCatalog\")\" class=\"btn btn-outline-secondary btn-lg\">\n                            <i class=\"bi bi-x-circle\"></i> Cancel\n                        </a>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        </div>\n    </div>\n</div>\n","filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement\\Views\\Product\\Delete.cshtml"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01AKn4efLCT3A7wUtdZ1xAY9__vscode-1779365922559","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

GetById(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.Categories\n                .AsNoTracking()\n                .Include(c => c.Products)\n                .FirstOrDefault(c => c.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        public List<Category> Search(string term, int maxResults = 10)\n        {\n            var query = _context.Categories.AsNoTracking();\n\n            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(term))\n            {\n                query = query.Where(c => c.Name.Contains(term));\n            }\n\n            return query.OrderBy(c => c.Name).Take(maxResults).ToList();\n        }\n    }\n}"},{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement.DAL\\Repositories\\SupplierEfRepository.cs","oldString":"        public Supplier? GetById(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.Suppliers\n                .AsNoTracking()\n                .Include(s => s.Products)\n                .FirstOrDefault(s => s.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        public List<Supplier> Search(string term, int maxResults = 10)\n        {\n            var query = _context.Suppliers.AsNoTracking();\n\n            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(term))\n            {\n                query = query.Where(s => s.Name.Contains(term));\n            }\n\n            return query.OrderBy(s => s.Name).Take(maxResults).ToList();\n        }\n    }\n}"}]},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01NKk8AndrhKCZwgayQHDy1V__vscode-1779365922561","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

{"timestamp":"2026-05-21T13:19:28.182Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement\\Controllers\\LookupController.cs","content":"using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\nusing InventoryManagement.DAL.Repositories;\n\nnamespace InventoryManagement.Controllers\n{\n    [Route(\"lookup\")]\n    [ApiController]\n    public class LookupController : Controller\n    {\n        private readonly CategoryEfRepository _categoryRepository;\n        private readonly SupplierEfRepository _supplierRepository;\n\n        public LookupController(CategoryEfRepository categoryRepository, SupplierEfRepository supplierRepository)\n        {\n            _categoryRepository = categoryRepository;\n            _supplierRepository = supplierRepository;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// AJAX endpoint for category autocomplete search.\n        /// Returns JSON array with id and text properties for use with jQuery Autocomplete or similar controls.\n        /// </summary>\n        [HttpGet(\"categories\")]\n        public JsonResult GetCategories(string? term)\n        {\n            var categories = _categoryRepository.Search(term);\n            var result = categories.Select(c => new { id = c.Id, text = c.Name }).ToList();\n            return Json(result);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// AJAX endpoint for supplier autocomplete search.\n        /// Returns JSON array with id and text properties for use with jQuery Autocomplete or similar controls.\n        /// </summary>\n        [HttpGet(\"suppliers\")]\n        public JsonResult GetSuppliers(string? term)\n        {\n            var suppliers = _supplierRepository.Search(term);\n            var result = suppliers.Select(s => new { id = s.Id, text = s.Name }).ToList();\n            return Json(result);\n        }\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_0171PkmLywKEzXv6G4WLtuct__vscode-1779365922562","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

set; } = string.Empty;\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Name attribute of the hidden input field that stores the selected ID.\n        /// Example: \"CategoryId\", \"SupplierId\"\n        /// </summary>\n        public string HiddenInputName { get; set; } = string.Empty;\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// ID attribute of the hidden input field that stores the selected ID.\n        /// Used as the form field name for model binding.\n        /// </summary>\n        public string HiddenInputId { get; set; } = string.Empty;\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// ID attribute of the display input field (visible to user).\n        /// Used by JavaScript to attach autocomplete plugin.\n        /// </summary>\n        public string DisplayInputId { get; set; } = string.Empty;\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// URL endpoint for AJAX autocomplete search.\n        /// Example: \"/lookup/categories\", \"/lookup/suppliers\"\n        /// </summary>\n        public string SearchUrl { get; set; } = string.Empty;\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Currently selected ID value (from existing entity).\n        /// Nullable to support new entity creation scenarios.\n        /// </summary>\n        public int? SelectedId { get; set; }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Display text for the currently selected value.\n        /// Shown in the display input field on initial page load.\n        /// </summary>\n        public string DisplayValue { get; set; } = string.Empty;\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Placeholder text for the display input field.\n        /// Example: \"Search for category...\", \"Select supplier...\"\n        /// </summary>\n        public string Placeholder { get; set; } = string.Empty;\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Helper text shown below the input field.\n        /// Can provide instructions or hint about autocomplete functionality.\n        /// </summary>\n        public string HelpText { get; set; } = string.Empty;\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_014SFMfpkSjhrryPbykkmyD2__vscode-1779365922563","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}
{"timestamp":"2026-05-21T13:33:32.264Z","hook_event_name":"UserPromptSubmit","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","prompt":"I am working on Lab 4 for my ASP.NET Core MVC InventoryManagement application.\r\n\r\nCreate only this file:\r\nInventoryManagement/Views/Shared/_AutocompleteDropdown.cshtml\r\n\r\nTask:\r\nCreate a reusable AJAX autocomplete dropdown partial view.\r\n\r\nRequirements:\r\n- Use model InventoryManagement.ViewModels.Shared.AutocompleteDropdownModel\r\n- Use Bootstrap styling\r\n- Render:\r\n  - visible text input for searching/display text\r\n  - hidden input for the selected ID\r\n  - validation span for the hidden input\r\n  - container for AJAX suggestions\r\n- The visible input should have:\r\n  class=\"form-control autocomplete-display\"\r\n  data-autocomplete=\"true\"\r\n  data-search-url from Model.SearchUrl\r\n  data-hidden-input-id from Model.HiddenInputId\r\n  autocomplete=\"off\"\r\n- Hidden input:\r\n  name must be Model.HiddenInputName\r\n  id must be Model.HiddenInputId\r\n  value must be Model.SelectedId\r\n- Validation span should use:\r\n  data-valmsg-for equal to Model.HiddenInputName\r\n  data-valmsg-replace=\"true\"\r\n- Do not use @section Scripts because this is a partial view.\r\n- Do not modify other files.","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}
{"timestamp":"2026-05-21T13:33:38.556Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"content":"@model AutocompleteDropdownModel\n\n<div class=\"mb-3\">\n    <label for=\"@Model.DisplayInputId\" class=\"form-label fw-semibold\">@Model.Label</label>\n    \n    <!-- Visible Display/Search Input -->\n    <input \n        type=\"text\"\n        id=\"@Model.DisplayInputId\"\n        class=\"form-control autocomplete-display\"\n        placeholder=\"@Model.Placeholder\"\n        value=\"@Model.DisplayValue\"\n        data-autocomplete=\"true\"\n        data-search-url=\"@Model.SearchUrl\"\n        data-hidden-input-id=\"@Model.HiddenInputId\"\n        autocomplete=\"off\" />\n    \n    <!-- Hidden ID Input (for form submission) -->\n    <input \n        type=\"hidden\"\n        id=\"@Model.HiddenInputId\"\n        name=\"@Model.HiddenInputName\"\n        value=\"@Model.SelectedId\" />\n    \n    <!-- Validation Message -->\n    <span \n        class=\"invalid-feedback d-block\"\n        data-valmsg-for=\"@Model.HiddenInputName\"\n        data-valmsg-replace=\"true\"></span>\n    \n    <!-- Help Text -->\n    @if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Model.HelpText))\n    {\n        <small class=\"form-text text-muted\">@Model.HelpText</small>\n    }\n    \n    <!-- AJAX Suggestions Container -->\n    <div id=\"@(Model.DisplayInputId)_suggestions\" class=\"list-group mt-1\" style=\"display: none;\"></div>\n</div>\n","filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement\\Views\\Shared\\_AutocompleteDropdown.cshtml"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01YNKcrrkcmGejuyNdP1qTY2__vscode-1779365922564","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}
{"timestamp":"2026-05-21T13:35:26.369Z","hook_event_name":"UserPromptSubmit","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","prompt":"I am working on Lab 4 for my ASP.NET Core MVC InventoryManagement application.\r\n\r\nCreate only this file:\r\nInventoryManagement/wwwroot/js/autocomplete-dropdown.js\r\n\r\nTask:\r\nCreate jQuery-based AJAX autocomplete behavior for the reusable autocomplete dropdown partial.\r\n\r\nRequirements:\r\n- Use jQuery.\r\n- Initialize all inputs with data-autocomplete=\"true\".\r\n- On input event, wait until the user typed at least 2 characters.\r\n- Send AJAX GET request to the URL from data-search-url with query parameter term.\r\n- Expected JSON result shape:\r\n  [{ id: 1, text: \"Electronics\" }]\r\n- Render suggestions below the input.\r\n- Clicking a suggestion should:\r\n  - set visible input value to result.text\r\n  - set hidden input value to result.id\r\n  - hide suggestions\r\n  - trigger blur and change validation on hidden input\r\n- If user changes text manually after selecting, clear hidden input.\r\n- On blur, hide suggestions after a short delay.\r\n- Add simple keyboard support:\r\n  - Escape hides suggestions\r\n- Add lightweight loading and no-results states.\r\n- Keep code simple and readable.\r\n- Do not modify other files.","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}
{"timestamp":"2026-05-21T13:35:38.969Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","tool_name":"create_file","tool_input":{"content":"$(document).ready(function() {\n    // Initialize autocomplete behavior for all inputs marked with data-autocomplete=\"true\"\n    const initAutocomplete = function() {\n        $('[data-autocomplete=\"true\"]').each(function() {\n            const $input = $(this);\n            const searchUrl = $input.data('search-url');\n            const hiddenInputId = $input.data('hidden-input-id');\n            const $hiddenInput = $('#' + hiddenInputId);\n            const suggestionsContainerId = $input.attr('id') + '_suggestions';\n            const $suggestions = $('#' + suggestionsContainerId);\n\n            // Handle input event\n            $input.on('input', function() {\n                const term = $input.val().trim();\n\n                // Clear hidden input if visible input was manually changed\n                if ($hiddenInput.val() && term !== $hiddenInput.data('last-text')) {\n                    $hiddenInput.val('');\n                }\n\n                // Only search if term is at least 2 characters\n                if (term.length < 2) {\n                    $suggestions.empty().hide();\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                // Show loading state\n                $suggestions.html('<div class=\"list-group-item text-muted\"><small>Loading...</small></div>').show();\n\n                // Send AJAX request\n                $.ajax({\n                    url: searchUrl,\n                    data: { term: term },\n                    method: 'GET',\n                    dataType: 'json',\n                    timeout: 5000,\n                    success: function(results) {\n                        renderSuggestions(results);\n                    },\n                    error: function() {\n                        $suggestions.html('<div class=\"list-group-item text-danger\"><small>Error loading results</small></div>').show();\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n\n            // Handle suggestion selection\n            $(document).on('click', '#' + suggestionsContainerId + ' .list-group-item', function() {\n                const $item = $(this);\n                const itemId = $item.data('item-id');\n                const itemText = $item.data('item-text');\n\n                $input.val(itemText);\n                $hiddenInput.val(itemId).data('last-text', itemText);\n                $suggestions.empty().hide();\n\n                // Trigger validation on hidden input\n                $hiddenInput.trigger('blur').trigger('change');\n            });\n\n            // Handle blur event - hide suggestions with slight delay\n            $input.on('blur', function() {\n                setTimeout(function() {\n                    $suggestions.fadeOut(200);\n                }, 200);\n            });\n\n            // Handle Escape key\n            $input.on('keydown', function(e) {\n                if (e.key === 'Escape') {\n                    $suggestions.empty().hide();\n                }\n            });\n\n            // Helper function to render suggestions\n            function renderSuggestions(results) {\n                if (!results || results.length === 0) {\n                    $suggestions.html('<div class=\"list-group-item text-muted\"><small>No results found</small></div>').show();\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                let html = '';\n                results.forEach(function(item) {\n                    html += `<button type=\"button\" class=\"list-group-item list-group-item-action\" data-item-id=\"${item.id}\" data-item-text=\"${item.text}\">\n                        ${escapeHtml(item.text)}\n                    </button>`;\n                });\n\n                $suggestions.html(html).show();\n            }\n\n            // Helper function to escape HTML special characters\n            function escapeHtml(text) {\n                const div = document.createElement('div');\n                div.textContent = text;\n                return div.innerHTML;\n            }\n        });\n    };\n\n    // Initialize on page load\n    initAutocomplete();\n\n    // Re-initialize if dynamic content is added (e.g., via AJAX)\n    $(document).on('ajaxStop', function() {\n        initAutocomplete();\n    });\n});\n","filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement\\wwwroot\\js\\autocomplete-dropdown.js"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_01KqUeym1tExkwwRvNe4Sp4a__vscode-1779365922565","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

term, int maxResults = 50)\n        {\n            var query = _context.Products\n                .AsNoTracking()\n                .Include(p => p.Category)\n                .Include(p => p.Supplier);\n\n            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(term))\n            {\n                query = query.Where(p =>\n                    p.Name.Contains(term) ||\n                    p.Description.Contains(term) ||\n                    p.Category.Name.Contains(term) ||\n                    p.Supplier.Name.Contains(term));\n            }\n\n            return query.OrderBy(p => p.Name).Take(maxResults).ToList();\n        }\n    }\n}"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01QEZ5tEQtX6hsi4vVjDSXDH__vscode-1779365922568","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

new List<InventoryManagement.Domain.Models.Product>();\n}\n\n@if (!products.Any())\n{\n    <tr>\n        <td colspan=\"8\" class=\"text-center text-muted py-4\">No products found.</td>\n    </tr>\n}\nelse\n{\n    @foreach (var item in products)\n    {\n        <tr>\n            <td class=\"ps-4\">\n                <div class=\"fw-semibold\">@item.Name</div>\n                <div class=\"text-muted small\">@item.Category?.Name ?? \"â€”\"</div>\n            </td>\n            <td>@(item.Price.ToString(\"C\"))</td>\n            <td><span class=\"badge bg-secondary\">@item.Type</span></td>\n            <td>@(item.Category?.Name ?? \"-\")</td>\n            <td>@(item.Supplier?.Name ?? \"-\")</td>\n            <td class=\"text-end\">@item.MinimumStock</td>\n            <td>\n                @if (item.IsActive)\n                {\n                    <span class=\"badge bg-success\">Active</span>\n                }\n                else\n                {\n                    <span class=\"badge bg-secondary\">Inactive</span>\n                }\n            </td>\n            <td class=\"text-end pe-4\">\n                <div class=\"btn-group btn-group-sm\" role=\"group\">\n                    <a href=\"/catalog/@item.Id\" class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" title=\"View Details\">\n                        Details\n                    </a>\n                    <a href=\"/catalog/@item.Id/edit\" class=\"btn btn-outline-info\" title=\"Edit Product\">\n                        <i class=\"bi bi-pencil\"></i>\n                    </a>\n                    <a href=\"/catalog/@item.Id/delete\" class=\"btn btn-outline-danger\" title=\"Delete Product\">\n                        <i class=\"bi bi-trash\"></i>\n                    </a>\n                </div>\n            </td>\n        </tr>\n    }\n}\n"},"tool_use_id":"toolu_bdrk_01RzyJRiB4WiXsVpvG1s8aRY__vscode-1779365922572","cwd":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP"}

Scripts {\n    <script>\n        $(document).ready(function() {\n            let searchTimeout;\n\n            // Handle product search input\n            $('#productSearchInput').on('input', function() {\n                clearTimeout(searchTimeout);\n                const term = $(this).val().trim();\n\n                // Show loading indicator\n                $('#productSearchLoading').show();\n\n                // Debounce search requests (300ms)\n                searchTimeout = setTimeout(function() {\n                    $.ajax({\n                        url: '/catalog/search',\n                        data: { term: term },\n                        method: 'GET',\n                        timeout: 5000,\n                        success: function(html) {\n                            // Fade out and replace content\n                            $('#productTableBody').fadeOut(150, function() {\n                                $(this).html(html).fadeIn(150);\n                            });\n                        },\n                        error: function() {\n                            $('#productTableBody').html('<tr><td colspan=\"8\" class=\"text-center text-danger py-4\">Error loading results. Please try again.</td></tr>');\n                        },\n                        complete: function() {\n                            // Hide loading indicator\n                            $('#productSearchLoading').hide();\n                        }\n                    });\n                }, 300);\n            });\n\n            // Handle clear button\n {"timestamp":"2026-05-21T14:05:28.973Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","tool_name":"replace_string_in_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement.DAL\\Repositories\\CategoryEfRepository.cs","newString":"        public List<Category> Search(string term, int maxResults = 10)\n        {\n            var query = _context.Categories.AsNoTracking();\n\n            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(term))\n            {\n                query = query.Where(c => c.Name.Contains(term));\n            }\n\n            return query.OrderBy(c => c.Name).Take(maxResults).ToList();\n        }\n\n        public void Add(Category category)\n        {\n            _context.Categories.Add(category);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public void Update(Category category)\n        {\n            _context.Categories.Update(category);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public bool Delete(int id)\n        {\n            var category = _context.Categories.FirstOrDefault(c => c.Id == id);\n\n            if (category == null)\n                return false;\n\n            if (!CanDelete(id))\n                return false;\n\n            _context.Categories.Remove(category);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        public bool Exists(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.Categories.Any(c => c.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        public bool CanDelete(int id)\n        {\n            var category = _context.Categories\n                .Include(c => c.Products)\n                .FirstOrDefault(c => c.Id == id);\n\n            if (category == null)\n                return false;\n\n            return !category.Products.Any();\n        }\n        \n    }\n}","oldString":"        public List<Category> Search(string term, int maxResults = 10)\n        {\n            var query = _context.Categories.AsNoTracking();\n\n            if {"timestamp":"2026-05-21T14:07:07.760Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","tool_name":"replace_string_in_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement\\Controllers\\CategoryController.cs","newString":"        [Route(\"/categories/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Details(int id)\n        {\n            var category = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (category == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            return View(category);\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/categories/create\")]\n        [Route(\"Category/Create\")]\n        public IActionResult Create()\n        {\n            var model = new CategoryFormModel();\n            return View(model);\n        }\n\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        [Route(\"/categories/create\")]\n        [Route(\"Category/Create\")]\n        public IActionResult Create(CategoryFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            var category = new Category\n            {\n                Name = model.Name,\n                Description = model.Description\n            };\n\n            _repository.Add(category);\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/categories/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [Route(\"Category/Edit/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id)\n        {\n            var category = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (category == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            var model = new CategoryFormModel\n            {\n                Id = category.Id,\n                Name = category.Name,\n                Description = category.Description\n            };\n\n            return View(model);\n        }\n\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        [Route(\"/categories/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [Route(\"Category/Edit/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id, CategoryFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (id != model.Id)\n            {\n                return BadRequest();\n            }\n\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            var category = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (category == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            category.Name = model.Name;\n            category.Description = model.Description;\n\n            _repository.Update(category);\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Details), new { id });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/categories/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [Route(\"Category/Delete/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Delete(int id)\n        {\n            var category = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (category == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            ViewBag.CanDelete = _repository.CanDelete(id);\n            return View(category);\n        }\n\n        [HttpPost]\n        [ValidateAntiForgeryToken]\n        [ActionName(\"Delete\")]\n        [Route(\"/categories/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [Route(\"Category/Delete/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult DeleteConfirmed(int id)\n        {\n            var deleted = _repository.Delete(id);\n\n            if (!deleted)\n            {\n                var category = _repository.GetById(id);\n                if (category != null)\n                {\n                    ViewBag.CanDelete = false;\n                    ModelState.AddModelError(\"\", \"Cannot delete this category because it is used by one or more products.\");\n                    return View(nameof(Delete), category);\n                }\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n        }\n\n        [HttpGet]\n        [Route(\"/categories/search\")]\n        public IActionResult Search(string? term)\n        {\n            var categories = _repository.Search(term);\n            return PartialView(\"_CategoryTableRows\", categories);\n        }\n    }\n}","oldString":"        [Route(\"/categories/{id:int}\")]\n        public <script>\n        $(document).ready(function() {\n            let searchTimeout;\n\n            // Handle category search input\n            $('#categorySearchInput').on('input', function() {\n                clearTimeout(searchTimeout);\n                const term = $(this).val().trim();\n\n                // Show loading indicator\n                $('#categorySearchLoading').show();\n\n and replace content\n                            $('#categoryTableBody').fadeOut(150, function() {\n                                $(this).html(html).fadeIn(150);\n                            });\n        public List<Supplier> Search(string? term, int maxResults = 50)\n        {\n            var query = _context.Suppliers.AsNoTracking();\n\n            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(term))\n            {\n                query = query.Where(s =>\n                    s.Name.Contains(term) ||\n                    s.Address.Contains(term) ||\n                    s.Phone.Contains(term) ||\n                    s.Email.Contains(term) ||\n                    s.ContactPerson.Contains(term));\n            }\n\n            return query.OrderBy(s => s.Name).Take(maxResults).ToList();\n        }\n\n        public void Add(Supplier supplier)\n        {\n            _context.Suppliers.Add(supplier);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public void Update(Supplier supplier)\n        {\n            _context.Suppliers.Update(supplier);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n        }\n\n        public bool Delete(int id)\n        {\n            var supplier = _context.Suppliers.FirstOrDefault(s => s.Id == id);\n\n            if (supplier == null)\n                return false;\n\n            if (!CanDelete(id))\n                return false;\n\n            _context.Suppliers.Remove(supplier);\n            _context.SaveChanges();\n            return true;\n        }\n\n        public bool Exists(int id)\n        {\n            return _context.Suppliers.Any(s => s.Id == id);\n        }\n\n        public bool CanDelete(int id)\n        {\n            var supplier = _context.Suppliers\n                .Include(s => s.Products)\n                .FirstOrDefault(s => s.Id == id);\n\n            if (supplier == null)\n                return false;\n\n            return !supplier.Products.Any();\n        }\n    }\n}","oldString":" [Route(\"/vendors/create\")]\n        [Route(\"Supplier/Create\")]\n        public IActionResult Create(SupplierFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            var supplier = new Supplier\n            {\n                Name = model.Name,\n                Address = model.Address,\n                Phone = model.Phone,\n                Email = model.Email,\n                ContactPerson = model.ContactPerson,\n                RegistrationDate = model.RegistrationDate,\n                IsActive = Address = supplier.Address,\n                Phone = supplier.Phone,\n                Email = supplier.Email,\n                ContactPerson = supplier.ContactPerson,\n                RegistrationDate    [Route(\"/vendors/{id:int}/edit\")]\n        [Route(\"Supplier/Edit/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Edit(int id, SupplierFormModel model)\n        {\n            if (id != model.Id)\n            {\n                return BadRequest();\n            }\n\n            if (!ModelState.IsValid)\n            {\n                return View(model);\n            }\n\n            var supplier = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (supplier == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            supplier.Name = model.Name;\n            supplier.Address = model.Address;\n            supplier.Phone = model.Phone;\n            supplier.Email = model.Email;\n            supplier.ContactPerson = model.ContactPerson;\n            supplier.RegistrationDate = model.RegistrationDate;\n            supplier.IsActive = model.IsActive;\n\n            _repository.Update(supplier);\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Details), new { id });\n        }\n\n        [Route(\"/vendors/{id:int}/delete\")]\n        [Route(\"Supplier/Delete/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult Delete(int id)\n        {\n            var supplier = _repository.GetById(id);\n            if (supplier == null)\n            {\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            ViewBag.CanDelete = _repository.CanDelete(id);\n [Route(\"Supplier/Delete/{id:int}\")]\n        public IActionResult DeleteConfirmed(int id)\n        {\n            var deleted = _repository.Delete(id);\n\n            if (!deleted)\n            {\n                var supplier = _repository.GetById(id);\n                if (supplier != null)\n                {\n                    ViewBag.CanDelete = false;\n                    ModelState.AddModelError(\"\", \"Cannot delete this supplier because it is used by one or more products.\");\n                    return View(nameof(Delete), supplier);\n                }\n                return NotFound();\n            }\n\n            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n        }\n\n        [HttpGet]\n        [Route(\"/vendors/search\")]\n        public IActionResult {"timestamp":"2026-05-21T14:19:02.875Z","hook_event_name":"PreToolUse","session_id":"b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb","transcript_path":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\AppData\\Roaming\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\4ceccc80f988eef15a55dde763df3b15\\GitHub.copilot-chat\\transcripts\\b1498202-9e0b-4682-9dbd-262f42c421fb.jsonl","tool_name":"replace_string_in_file","tool_input":{"filePath":"c:\\Users\\simunnn\\Desktop\\asp\\PolimanacASP\\InventoryManagement\\InventoryManagement\\Views\\Supplier\\Index.cshtml","newString":"  <!-- Supplier list with search -->\n  <div class=\"row\">\n    <div class=\"col-12\">\n      <div class=\"card border-0 shadow-sm\">\n        <div class=\"card-header bg-white border-bottom\">\n          <div class=\"row g-2 align-items-center\">\n            <div class=\"col-md-8\">\n              <div class=\"input-group input-group-sm\">\n                <span class=\"input-group-text bg-light border-0\">\n                  <i class=\"bi bi-search\"></i>\n                </span>\n                <input type=\"text\" id=\"supplierSearchInput\" class=\"form-control border-start-0\" placeholder=\"Search by name, email, phone, address or contact person...\" />\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"col-md-4 text-end\">\n              <button type=\"button\" id=\"clearSupplierSearch\" class=\"btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm\">\n                <i class=\"bi bi-x-circle\"></i> Clear\n              </button>\n              <span id=\"supplierSearchLoading\" class=\"ms-2\" style=\"display: none;\">\n                <span class=\"spinner-border spinner-border-sm text-primary\" role=\"status\" aria-hidden=\"true\"></span>\n                <small class=\"text-muted ms-1\">Searching...</small>\n              </span>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"card-body p-0\">\n          <div class=\"table-responsive\">\n            <table class=\"table table-hover align-middle mb-0\">\n              <thead class=\"table-light\">\n                <tr>\n                  <th class=\"ps-4\">Supplier</th>\n                  <th>Address</th>\n                  <th>Phone</th>\n                  <th>Contact Person</th>\n                  <th>Status</th>\n                  <th class=\"text-end pe-4\">Actions</th>\n                </tr>\n              </thead>\n              <tbody id=\"supplierTableBody\">\n                @await Html.PartialAsync(\"_SupplierTableRows\", Model)\n              </tbody>\n            </table>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n@section Scripts {\n    <script>\n        $(document).ready(function() {\n            let searchTimeout;\n\n            // Handle supplier search input\n            $('#supplierSearchInput').on('input', function() {\n                clearTimeout(searchTimeout);\n                const term = $(this).val().trim();\n\n                // Show loading indicator\n                $('#supplierSearchLoading').show();\n\n                // Debounce search requests (300ms)\n                searchTimeout = setTimeout(function() {\n                    $.ajax({\n                        url: '/vendors/search',\n                        data: { term: term },\n                        method: 'GET',\n                        timeout: 5000,\n                        success: function(html) {\n                            // Fade out and replace content\n                            $('#supplierTableBody').fadeOut(150, function() {\n                                $(this).html(html).fadeIn(150);\n                            });\n                        },\n                        error: function() {\n                            $('#supplierTableBody').html('<tr><td colspan=\"6\" class=\"text-center text-danger py-4\">Error loading results. Please try again.</td></tr>');\n                        },\n                        complete: function() {\n                            // Hide loading indicator\n                            $('#supplierSearchLoading').hide();\n                        }\n                    });\n                }, 300);\n            });\n\n            // Handle clear button\n            $('#clearSupplierSearch').on('click', function() {\n                $('#supplierSearchInput').val('').focus();\n                clearTimeout(searchTimeout);\n                $('#supplierSearchLoading').show();\n\n                // Reload all suppliers\n                $.ajax({\n                    url: '/vendors/search',\n                    data: { term: '' },\n                    method: 'GET',\n                    timeout: 5000,\n                    success: function(html) {\n                        $('#supplierTableBody').fadeOut(150, function() {\n                            $(this).html(html).fadeIn(150);\n                        });\n                    },\n                    complete: function() {\n                        $('#supplierSearchLoading').hide();\n                    }\n                });\n            });\n        });\n    </script>\n}","oldString":"  <!-- Supplier list -->\n  <div class=\"row\">\n    <div class=\"col-12\">\n      <div class=\"card border-0 shadow-sm\">\n        <div class=\"card-header bg-white border-bottom d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between\">\n          <strong class=\"mb-0\">Suppliers</strong>\n          <small class=\"text-muted\">Read-only â€” procurement overview</small>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"card-body p-0\">\n          <div   {\n                  <tr>\n                    <td colspan=\"7\" class=\"text-center py-4 text-muted\">No suppliers available.</td>\n                  </tr>\n                }\n                else\n                {\n                  @foreach (var supplier in Model.OrderBy(s => s.Name))\n                  {\n                    var productCount = supplier.Products?.Count() ?? 0;\n                    var collapseId = $\"products-{supplier.Id}\";\n                    <tr>\n                      <td>\n                        <div class=\"d-flex align-items-start\">\n           <td class=\"text-center\">\n                        <button class=\"btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary\" type=\"button\" data-bs-toggle=\"collapse\" data-bs-target=\"#@collapseId\"                      }\n                        else\n                        {\n                          <span class=\"badge bg-secondary\">Inactive</span>\n                        }\n                      <div class=\"collapse\" id=\"@collapseId\">\n                          <div class=\"border-top p-3 bg-white\">\n                            <div class=\"d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-2\">\n                              <div class=\"fw-semibold\">Products supplied by @supplier.Name</div>\n                              <div class=\"small
